roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
DEFT'S MOT FOR MODIFICATION OF PROBATIONARY SENTENCE FILED

/CAL:MOTION TO MODIFY PROBATION SENTENCE/CTORD:PROBATION SENTENCE IS MODIFIED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE 1 YEAR IN COUNTY JAIL THROUGH THE SHERIFF'S ELECTRONIC MONITORING PROGRAM, WHILE IN THE ELECTRONIC MONITORING PROGRAM, DEFENDANT MUST ATTEND AND COMPLETETHE WALDEN HOUSE OUTPATIENT PROGRAM, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE 234 DAYS CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED UP TO TODAY, 03-06-12, DEFENDANT MUST SERVE REMAINING 131DAYS IN THE SHERIFF'S ELECTRONIC MONITORING PROGRAM, IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLETE THE PROGRAM OR DOES NOT COMPLY WITH ELECTRONIC MONITORING PROGRAM,HE WILL NOT RECEIVE ANY CREDIT, ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN IN EFFECT,/

/CAL:FELONY SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1 Y/CTS:41/4019HALF/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT MUST SUCCESSFULLY SERVE THE BALANCE OF HIS SENTENCE IN ARESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM; FAILURE OF THIS PROGRAM WILL RESULT IN THELOSS OF CREDITS EARNED IN THE PROGRAM/DNACOMP/WS/RX/DTC/11590/WEAP/CTORD:THAT THE U,S, CURRENCY FOUND ON THE DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $840,00 IS FORFEITED/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/LFNEW/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 12-02-11/BAIL:145000/CONTD:PRELIMINARYHEARING/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:12-22-11/
